title: https://github.com/ShunsukeHayashi/agent-skill-bus FUGUE/Kernelに必要か、批判的吟味せよ
summary_text: `[phase:plan] [family:fugue-hook-scout] [provider_hint:codex]` 最小フックは以下です。 - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1210-1221` `provider_diff_audit` の変数初期化ブロック（`provider_diff_latest_*` の格納先確保）。 - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1232-1241` `provider-diff-audit.json` の jq 抽出直後で `provider_diff_latest_type/field/provider/severity/ts` を読むフック。 - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1267-1296` `tmp_integrated_json` へ `jq` で `provider_diff_audit_latest_*` を `integrated.json` に注入するフック。 - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1334` `summary.md` の provider diff 行追加ポイント（`provider diff latest: ...`）。 - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh:233-240` `test_local_baseline_trio_passes()` の `integrated.json` 最新フィールド（`provider_diff_audit_latest_*`）アサートポイント。 - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh:244` `summary.md` の最新 diff 1行表現を検証する `grep` フック。
